description: Anchors a digital artifact to an AT Protocol DID via a content-addressable hash. The creator's signing key attests authorship. A proof record establishes the canonical identity binding between an artifact and its creator — it does not assert ownership, only provenance.

main.description: A provenance record binding a digital artifact (identified by CID) to a creator DID. Must be written into the creator's own AT Proto repo; the repo signature implicitly signs the claim.

artifactCid.description: Content Identifier (CID) of the artifact, encoded in DAG-CBOR with base32 multibase prefix. Deterministic: identical bytes always produce the same CID. Must be computed over the raw artifact bytes, not a serialised wrapper.

algorithm.description: Hash algorithm used to derive the CID. sha2-256 is the baseline requirement; blake3 is preferred when the verifying party supports it.

signerDid.description: DID of the entity asserting authorship. MUST match the DID of the AT Proto repo in which this record is stored. Verified by resolving the DID document and checking the repo's commit signature.

mimeType.description: IANA media type of the artifact (e.g. image/png, video/mp4, audio/flac, application/pdf). Used by verifiers to apply type-appropriate decoding before hashing.

title.description: Optional human-readable title for the artifact. Not used in hash computation.

description.description: Optional description of the artifact. Not used in hash computation.

metadataUri.description: Optional URI pointing to extended metadata. May be an AT URI (at://) to a blob record in the creator's repo, or an HTTPS URL to an external metadata document. Not authoritative — the CID is the authoritative identifier.

previousProofUri.description: Optional AT URI of a prior at.ofwork.proof record for this artifact. Use when re-attesting a previously published artifact (e.g. after a DID rotation or key migration). Forms a chain of custody.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime at which the creator asserts the artifact was produced. May differ from the record's indexed timestamp.

verificationResult.description: Non-stored helper type describing the outcome of verifying a proof record. Used in client tooling.

cidMatch.description: True if recomputing the artifact CID from the raw bytes matches the stored artifactCid.

didResolved.description: True if the signerDid resolved successfully to a DID document.

signatureValid.description: True if the AT Proto repo commit signature for this record is valid under the signerDid's current verification key.
